entities.name: LABILE CARBON POOLS
entities.description: Rapidly and moderately degradable fractions of soil organic carbon used as indicators of soil quality and carbon dynamics

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The organic matter in soil from which labile carbon pools are derived

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: A measure of the soil's capacity to function as a vital living system

entities.name: CARBON DYNAMICS
entities.description: The processes governing the cycling and transformation of carbon in the soil

entities.name: SEQUENTIAL ACID HYDROLYSIS
entities.description: A two-step chemical process used to extract labile carbon pools from soil

entities.name: NUTRIENT CYCLING
entities.description: The movement and exchange of organic and inorganic nutrients over the short and long term

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of agricultural systems to maintain or return to a stable state after disturbance

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Managed environments used for crop production where soil carbon dynamics are studied
